title: poa pratensis var. alpina
intro: Poa pratensis var. alpina, also known as alpine meadow grass, is a rare and hardy perennial grass species, native to high-altitude mountain regions. Traditionally, Poa pratensis var. alpina has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Poa pratensis var. alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health, soothe digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
